Alright, it's time to get into action. So what the podcast action plan does is take all your other training and all the other resources and just puts it in a very streamlined step by step plan so you know exactly what to do in exactly the right order. So the goal here is to get your podcast launched and start monetizing and making money from it. The very first step is just you got to kind of do some research, get yourself prepared. So these are some things that you're going to want to do just before you actually get this thing live. Obviously you got to figure out what your name is going to be. You got to get your art. You got to do those kind of things. And then this recommends the different resources within the training. So you've got the podcast directory tutorial just so you can kind of take a look at what's out there. You got checklists. So everything is really tied together in this action plan. Then you're going to get your hosting account up and running and your RSS feed so that you can have your podcast distributed to all these different directories. And of course we're giving you video training on how to do it. We give you the recommended hosting. And then obviously the big part is you got to record and edit your first podcast. So a lot of resources here. You're going to want to use your checklist, a brainstorm flow chart. Everything here is going to give you what you need. You have a couple of big options. Obviously you can either edit the podcast yourself or you can send them to an editing service. Once you've got your podcast up and running, then you need to upload your shows and really kind of create some show notes and just get yourself ready so this thing is ready to rock. And then you're going to make sure that your RSS feeds are submitted to directories. And this is something you only need to do one time. And again, all of this stuff is covered in much greater detail in the manual. All this is just giving you very, very clear path of what steps to take and what order so you can learn more about all of these things within the manual, within the flowcharts and the checklists and within the videos. And then the last step here is to post your website, post it on your website and start promoting. You know, really get the word out and gives you all the different steps to do that. And then making sure that you've got your monetization strategy ready so you can make some money from this podcast. We cover all of these in great length in the manual.
